tasks.label: Git Snapshot Commit
tasks.command: $stamp = Get-Date -Format 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm'; $msg = 'snapshot: ' + $stamp; git add -A; git diff --cached --quiet; if ($LASTEXITCODE -eq 0) { Write-Host 'No changes to commit'; exit 0 }; git commit -m $msg

tasks.label: Git Snapshot Commit + Push
tasks.command: $stamp = Get-Date -Format 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm'; $msg = 'snapshot: ' + $stamp; git add -A; git diff --cached --quiet; if ($LASTEXITCODE -eq 0) { Write-Host 'No changes to commit'; exit 0 }; git commit -m $msg; if ($LASTEXITCODE -eq 0) { git push }
